task_completion.description: Log into the OpenCAD system using admin credentials.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the OpenCAD login screen being filled with admin credentials or the OpenCAD dashboard visible after successful login.

task_completion.description: Locate the specific support truck by its license plate.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent navigating to the civilian vehicles section and searching for or finding the plate 'XCAV8R'.

task_completion.description: Open the existing vehicle record for editing to preserve its history.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent clicking an 'Edit' button or opening the edit form specifically for the existing vehicle with plate 'XCAV8R'.

task_completion.description: Update the Registered Owner field to the new owner.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show 'Sarah SiteLead' being typed, searched, or selected in the Registered Owner field of the vehicle edit form.

task_completion.description: Save the changes and verify the vehicle ownership transfer.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent clicking save/submit, followed by a success notification or the vehicle details page displaying 'Sarah SiteLead' as the owner of plate 'XCAV8R'.

integrity.description: The agent used the OpenCAD web interface to perform the transfer.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent interacts with the web browser UI (OpenCAD). There should be no terminal windows open executing direct MySQL queries or cURL commands to bypass the UI.

integrity.description: The agent edited the existing record rather than deleting and recreating it.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no evidence of the agent clicking 'Delete' on the vehicle record or using a 'Create New Vehicle' form for plate XCAV8R.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual application in a web browser.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser address bar should show the correct local URL (http://localhost) and not a local file path or text editor.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target Vehicle Plate: XCAV8R. Old Owner: John Driller. New Owner: Sarah SiteLead. The task requires editing the existing database record to update the owner_id, preserving the original vehicle ID. Ensure the agent edits the vehicle rather than deleting and recreating it.
